CitationRecord.description: Pointer to one supporting span inside the approved corpus.

chunk_id.description: Stable chunk identifier for the cited evidence span.
chunk_id.title: Chunk Id

doc_id.description: Stable source document identifier for the cited evidence.
doc_id.title: Doc Id

end_offset.description: Exclusive end offset of the supporting span inside the chunk text.
end_offset.title: End Offset

marker.description: User-visible citation marker, for example [1] or [2].
marker.title: Marker

start_offset.description: Inclusive start offset of the supporting span inside the chunk text.
start_offset.title: Start Offset

CitationRecord.title: CitationRecord

RefusalReasonCode.description: Allowed refusal categories for user-visible trust-layer refusals.
RefusalReasonCode.title: RefusalReasonCode

RefusalRecord.description: Structured refusal payload attached to every query response.

is_refusal.description: Whether the response is an explicit refusal instead of a supported answer.
is_refusal.title: Is Refusal

message.description: User-visible refusal message, or null for supported answers.
message.title: Message

reason_code.description: Machine-readable refusal reason code, or null for supported answers.

RefusalRecord.title: RefusalRecord

description: Canonical response contract shared by generation, validation, and API serialization.

citations.description: Supporting citation records for a grounded answer. Refusals must return an empty list.
citations.title: Citations

final_answer.description: User-visible final answer text. For refusals this should be the refusal text shown to the user.
final_answer.title: Final Answer

refusal.description: Structured refusal state for the response.

title: QueryResponse
